channel.title: GitHub QML Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of QML in GitHub

item.title: hiroi-sora/Umi-OCR
item.description: OCR software, free and offline. 开源、免费的离线OCR软件。支持截屏/批量导入图片，PDF文档识别，排除水印/页眉页脚，扫描/生成二维码。内置多国语言库。

item.title: Swordfish90/cool-retro-term
item.description: A good looking terminal emulator which mimics the old cathode display...

item.title: 3ximus/aerial-sddm-theme
item.description: SDDM theme with Apple TV Aerial videos
